title: LLM Pricing Data Schema
description: Schema for LLM API pricing data (v8.0 — pricing-only, supports token/per-second/per-item pricing)

ModelPricing.description: Pricing keyed by currency code (e.g. USD, CNY). No metadata — provider is inferred from model_id prefix by consumers.

CurrencyPricing.description: Pricing for a model in a specific currency. Each modality has its own namespace.

text.description: Text token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for all standard language models.

audio.description: Audio token pricing ($/1M tokens). Present for TTS and voice I/O models.

image.description: Image pricing. input is $/1M tokens (image input tokens). output is $/image (flat per-image fee for generation models).

video.description: Video pricing. in/out are $/1M tokens (understanding). sec is $/second (generation). May contain tiered array with resolution field.

music.description: Music generation pricing. Uses per key ($/request or $/song).

tiered.description: Tiered pricing (e.g. price differs by context length)

ModalityPricing.description: Pricing for a single modality. in/out are $/1M tokens. sec is $/second. per is $/item.

tiered.description: Resolution-based tiered pricing within a modality

ImageModalityPricing.description: Pricing for image modality. in/out are $/1M tokens. per is $/image (generation models).

write.description: Price for creating/writing cache entry per 1M tokens

in.description: Batch API input price per 1M tokens

out.description: Batch API output price per 1M tokens

image_out.description: Batch API price per 1M image output tokens

tier_start.description: Inclusive start of token range for this tier

tier_end.description: Exclusive end of token range (omitted for the last/open-ended tier)

in.description: Input price per 1M tokens for this tier

out.description: Output price per 1M tokens for this tier

GenerationTier.description: Resolution-based pricing tier for generation models (e.g., video at different resolutions).

sec.description: Price per second at this resolution

per.description: Price per item at this resolution
